scope: READ-ONLY discovery-class depth-tape anatomy (Q25). Descriptive only — NO bootstrap, NO CI, NO verdict, NO P&L, NO registry flip.

anchors.note: fill-rate anchors cited for orientation ONLY; turnover is a looser observability proxy, not the fill rate — it can rule a cell OUT (dead-thin), never rule one IN as fillable.

definitions.category: crypto (KXBTC/KXETH) | soccer | baseball | basketball | sports_other (any unmapped sports family). See SUBCATEGORY_MAP.

ttc_buckets.post_close: ttc < 0 (late capture of a settled/closing market)
ttc_buckets.coarse_clamp: day-resolved (date-only) closes are never placed in <15m or 15-60m; those are promoted to 1-6h (unknown intra-day time).
ttc_buckets.crypto_timezone: crypto hour token is ET (EDT/UTC-4 in July), confirmed against tape + crypto_hourly.py; sports HHMM treated as UTC per spec (true tz is league-local, unverifiable from tape).

definitions.queue_depth: per capture: yes_bid_side = yes_bids[0][1]; yes_ask_side_mirror = no_bids[0][1] (a YES offer at p is a NO bid at 1-p). Median+p25/p75.
definitions.staleness: consecutive same-ticker pair (ordered by captured_at across all days) with UNCHANGED BBO 4-tuple = frozen (L32). frozen_pair_fraction + a family/category streak-length distribution. Hourly-cadence caveat: a frozen hourly pair is not proof of no intra-hour movement.
definitions.one_sided: yes_side_empty (no yes_bids), no_side_empty (no no_bids => no tradeable YES ask), any_side_empty (L31 wing shape).
definitions.turnover_formula: For a consecutive same-ticker capture pair where the best PRICE on a side is UNCHANGED and size_prev>0: turnover = max(0, size_prev - size_now) / size_prev. Per side (yes_bid_side = top yes_bid; yes_ask_side = mirror = top no_bid). Snapshot-sampled at hourly cadence: intra-hour round-trips invisible (undercount); a best-price move resets/excludes the pair. A coarse observability proxy, NOT a fill rate. Anchors for orientation: 0.45% (S19 DEAD), 2.5% (S14 wing).
definitions.pair_assignment: staleness/turnover pairs assigned to the EARLIER capture's cell.
